backup_pool.description: Specifies the name of the backup pool used in case the primary pool fails. Optional and can be null.

description.description: Provides additional information or context about the resource. Optional and can be null.

failover_ratio.description: Defines the threshold for triggering failover, expressed as a number between 0 and 1. Optional and can be null.

health_checks.description: Lists the identifiers of health checks associated with the resource. Must be strings. Optional and can be null.

instances.description: Lists the instances included in the resource configuration. Must be strings. Optional and can be null.

name.description: Specifies the name of the resource. Cannot be null and must be provided.

session_affinity.description: Determines how sessions are managed for resource traffic, such as client IP-based or cookie-based affinity. Optional and can be null.

timeouts.description: Defines custom time limits for create, delete, and update operations. Each timeout is optional and can be specified as a string. Optional and can be null.
